summary: A web project with a James Bond (007) aesthetic and Die Hard-inspired music theme. Currently on Version 8.

existing_features.title: Increase the duration of the Bond-style gun barrel (007) loading animation shown on the InitialLoadingScreen so that it remains visible for a noticeably longer period when the page first loads.

new_feature_requests.summary: Extend the duration of the 007 loading animation on initial page load
